info.title: LegalMind API Documentation
info.description: Complete API documentation for LegalMind authentication system with blogs, comments, and bookmarks

bearerAuth.description: Enter your JWT token in the format: Bearer {token}

cookieAuth.name: refreshToken
cookieAuth.description: Refresh token stored in httpOnly cookie

password.description: Must contain uppercase, lowercase, and number (Step 1)

teamSize.description:
Team size (Step 2):
- solo: Individual lawyer (فردي)
- small: Specialized partners (2-10) (شركاء متخصصون)
- medium: Medium team (11-50) (فريق متوسط)
- large: Large team (50+) (فريق كبير)

post.summary: Request password reset for logged-in user
post.description: Sends a password reset token to the authenticated user's email address. User must be logged in.

message.example: Password reset link has been sent to your email.

post.description: Resets the user password using the token received via email

token.description: The reset token received via email

password.description: Must contain at least one uppercase, one lowercase, and one number

get.description: Retrieve all published blogs with pagination, search, and filtering

post.description: Create a new blog post (authentication required)

content.example: Criminal law in Egypt is primarily governed by...

excerpt.example: A comprehensive guide to criminal law

get.description: Get trending blogs from last 7 days
Get single blog details and increment view count
Get all blogs created by authenticated user

post.description: Add or remove a bookmark for a blog (toggle behavior)

bookmarked.description: True if bookmarked, false if removed

patch.description: Update blog status (draft, pending, published, rejected)

post.summary: Create a comment on a blog
post.description: Create a new comment on a published blog (requires authentication)

400.description: Bad request - Invalid input or blog not published

get.summary: Get all comments for a blog
get.description: Retrieve all comments for a specific blog (public access)

put.description: Update the content of your own comment (requires authentication)

delete.description: Delete your own comment (requires authentication, admins can delete any comment)

get.description: Get all bookmarked blogs for authenticated user with pagination
